title: SAGA: A Sequence-Adaptive Generative Architecture for Multi-Horizon Probabilistic Forecasting with Adaptive Temporal Conformal Prediction
description:
SAGA is a sequence-adaptive generative transformer architecture for multi-horizon probabilistic forecasting of individual earnings trajectories in large administrative panel data. This repository contains the full source code, configuration files, training scripts, evaluation pipelines, and documentation for the SAGA model and its associated manuscript submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (2026).

The repository includes:

  • Installable Python package (src/saga/)
  • Training, inference, and evaluation scripts (scripts/)
  • Jupyter notebooks for reproducibility (notebooks/)
  • Comprehensive documentation mirroring the manuscript (docs/)
  • Unit and integration tests (tests/)
  • Configuration files for all model variants (configs/)
  • Benchmarks on NVIDIA A100 hardware (benchmarks/)

The synthetic mirror dataset (500,000 individuals) is hosted on Zenodo under DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20260287 and enables pipeline-level replication without access to the protected Statistics Sweden LISA microdata.

Preprint: https://arxiv.org/abs/__TBD_ARXIV_ID__. Ethics approval: Swedish Ethical Review Authority decision 2026-04127-01. Data project: Statistics Sweden MONA SCB-MONA-2026-147.

creators.name: Laitinen-Fredriksson Lundstrom-Imanov, Gustav Olaf Yunus

notes: Replace __TBD_ARXIV_ID__ with the actual arXiv identifier once the preprint is posted. This repository uses the Apache 2.0 license for code. The permitted-use scope explicitly excludes credit scoring, insurance pricing, employment screening, and tax-enforcement targeting of individuals. See docs/ethics/dual-use-statement.md.
